reviewNotes.note: Description mentions '--json global options' but out-of-scope section lists '--json flag implementation on commands (Sprint 2+)'. The test steps only inspect code structure and don't verify --json behavior, so this is unlikely to cause evaluation problems. Recommend interpreting this as: the Typer callback may declare a --json option for future use, but no command is required to honor it this sprint. If the generator omits --json entirely, that should not be a failure.

Description says 'at minimum strings and comma-delimited lists into Python types (str, list)'. Test step 3 says 'Verify list/record return values are parsed to Python list/dict' — adding dict for record parsing goes beyond the stated minimum. During evaluation, will test str and list as the threshold. Dict support is a nice-to-have, not a fail condition.

planFeatures: pyproject.toml with metadata, dependencies, and mailctl entry point
AppleScript engine: execute scripts via osascript, parse results, handle errors
Error categories: Mail.app not running, permission denied, script error
pytest infrastructure with osascript mock fixture
Unit tests for the AppleScript engine
coverageAssessment.gaps: None — all planned sprint features are covered by at least one criterion. Coverage is thorough with 25 criteria across 6 categories.

testabilityAssessment: All 25 criteria are testable. Methods span file-inspection, cli-execution, code-inspection, unit-test, and test-execution. Test steps are specific with concrete thresholds. Criteria that require running code (C-002, C-005, C-006, C-020, C-021, C-022) have clear expected outputs. No criterion relies on Mail.app being present, which is correct for Sprint 1.
outOfScopeAssessment: Out-of-scope list is comprehensive and correctly defers Sprint 2+ features. The only friction point is the --json mention in C-007 vs its presence in out-of-scope (noted above). regressionSprints is correctly empty for Sprint 1.
overallAssessment: Strong contract. 25 criteria provide thorough coverage of all Sprint 1 deliverables. Criteria are specific, measurable, and testable without Mail.app. The two minor notes are edge cases that won't block evaluation. Accepted without revision.
